products.title: Soft Pink Pupfish T-Shirt
products.description: This pink tee elevates simplicity to its finest. Its clean design, featuring our signature logo and a minimalist back detail, makes it this summer’s must-have essential. Perfect kids clothes for little thinkers who see magic everywhere.

products.title: Blue Camaleon Sweatpants
products.description: Vibrant blue and iconic details define these pants, where sporty stripes and a relaxed fit turn them into a retro-inspired essential for the fall winter 2025 collection.

products.title: Purple Camaleon Sweatpants
products.description: Everyday ease and vintage charm meet in these purple pants, where bold stripes and a relaxed fit turn them into a playful tribute to retro sportswear for fall winter 2025.

products.title: Purple Squad Long Sleeve T-shirt
products.description: This cozy purple sweatshirt celebrates childhood adventure with vintage sporty charm in fall winter 2025.

products.title: Blue Squad Long Sleeve T-shirt

products.title: Red Worm Socks

products.title: Green Raven Sweater

products.title: Striped Racoon Cardigan
products.description: Made of thick cotton with an oversized cut, this kid's striped cardigan with a front logo adds warmth and character. A new design from The Animals Observatory’s Crazy Farm collection that brings together comfort and creativity.We recommend choosing one size down if you prefer not to have the oversized fit.

products.title: Green Racoon Cardigan

products.title: Green Panda Bomber Jacket
products.description: The Animals Observatory kids’ green bomber jacket from the Crazy Farm collection, classic and cool, made of water-repellent ripstop. Perfect for layering.

products.title: Pink Tortoise Dress

The capacity of the bottle is 475ml. - Bottle: a doubl
